data.name: Gym Bullies
data.detailed_description:
GYM BULLIES


Bullies Are Everywhere...

As a young girl, you live with your housemate Emilia. Your housemate and you both going gym workout but unfortunately, you girls using different gyms.

One day, Emilia came back home crying. You ask her why and she just says she's bullied by a group of rich girls at gym and they threatened her never to come back to gym ever.

Emilia is a beautiful, cute and kind girl so she always draws attention of people, even if she don't try to. Seems like some jealous eyes targeted her.

But you know one thing... Nobody can bully your bestie, and you are good at teaching lessons.

**86 ACHIEVEMENTS**
**SIMPLE GAMEPLAY**
**EASY GALLERY**

data.short_description: Gym Bullies is a game with a story that you are racing with time and testing your typing skills~

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: 2 Ghz
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9 Compatible Graphics Card
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 350 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: MacOS X 10+
  • 處理器: 2 Ghz Dual Core
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Intel HD4000
  • 儲存空間: 350 MB 可用空間
